summary: Iteration 50: Security Hardening Audit for Apple App Store submission. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: SignupPage with DateMaskInput renders correctly, multi-step flow works through step 3. OTP-based authentication is properly enforced.

issues: Address autocomplete dropdown intercepts clicks when suggestions appear - user needs to select a suggestion or click outside to proceed

rate_limiting_strict_10_per_min.evidence: Test received 429 response after multiple requests, confirming strict rate limiting

rate_limiting_moderate_20_per_min.evidence: check-email endpoints in moderate_paths array at middleware.py line 79-84

encryption_key_fail_fast.evidence: RuntimeError raised if ENCRYPTION_KEY not set - no fallback

date_mask_input_extraction.evidence: Component properly formats date as MM/DD/YYYY (tested: 01/15/1990)

frontend_test_results.signup_page_step1_name: PASS - First/Middle/Last name fields with correct data-testids
frontend_test_results.login_otp_flow: PASS - Two-Factor Authentication modal displays correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All security hardening changes implemented correctly
Rate limiting tiers properly configured (strict: 10/min, moderate: 20/min, general: 120/min)
ENCRYPTION_KEY and JWT_SECRET both fail-fast without fallback
OTP comparison uses constant-time comparison via hmac.compare_digest
Dev-switcher properly gated behind environment check
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening audit complete. All security changes verified: (1) Rate limiting 10/min on auth endpoints, (2) Encryption key fail-fast, (3) Dev-switcher production gate, (4) Timing-safe OTP with hmac.compare_digest, (5) DateMaskInput component works correctly. OTP is enabled for all logins. Demo bypass available: demo@carryon.us with OTP 000000.

mocked_apis.note: Apple In-App Purchase validation is MOCKED (per main agent note)
